hero.headline:
Where performance
meets lifestyle.
hero.subtitle: Boutique training, recovery, nutrition, and healthy social energy in the heart of Madrid.

brand.headline:
More than a gym.
A daily ritual.
brand.body: Pomona Club blends training, recovery, and nourishing food into one elevated experience. Move harder, recover better, and stay longer in a space designed for performance and connection.
brand.trainDesc: Expert-led sessions in strength, HIIT, Pilates, and HYROX.
brand.recoverDesc: Sauna, infrared, physiotherapy, and restorative movement.
brand.refuelDesc: Smoothies, coffee, and nourishing meals at our healthy bar.
brand.connectDesc: A community built around shared ambition and daily ritual.

pillars.headline: Four pillars. One elevated routine.
pillars.trainDesc: From high-intensity sessions to mindful Pilates, every class is designed to challenge, refine, and reward. Small groups. Expert coaches. Measurable progress.
pillars.recoverDesc: Infrared sauna, physiotherapy, mobility sessions, and guided recovery protocols. Because what you do after training defines what you do next.
pillars.refuelDesc: Smoothies, specialty coffee, protein bowls, and functional drinks crafted for performance and pleasure. Stay longer. Eat better.
pillars.belongDesc: More than members — a community of ambitious, health-conscious people who share values, energy, and a space worth returning to every day.

signature.headline: Every session, intentionally designed.
signature.body: From competitive HYROX prep to meditative Pilates, every offering at Pomona is crafted to elevate how you move, recover, and feel.

social.headline:
Loved by Madrid professionals,
athletes, and wellness-first locals.

membership.headline: Choose the rhythm that fits your life.
membership.body: From flexible training access to full club immersion — every membership includes the Pomona experience.
membership.essentialsIdeal: For those starting their Pomona journey
membership.plusIdeal: For committed performers who want it all
membership.trialLink: Not sure yet? Book a free trial session →

healthyBarSection.headline:
Refuel without
leaving the club.
healthyBarSection.body: From cold-pressed juices to specialty coffee, protein bowls to functional elixirs — our bar is where post-workout recovery meets the social energy of a premium café.
healthyBarSection.body2: Designed for members who want to stay longer, eat better, and turn their training session into a complete daily ritual. The healthy bar is open to both members and visitors.

trainers.headline: Expert-led. Always personal.
trainers.body: Every session at Pomona is guided by coaches who combine deep expertise, genuine attention, and a shared commitment to your progress.

location.headline:
In the heart of Madrid's
finest neighbourhood.
location.body: Pomona Club is located on Calle de Serrano, in the Salamanca district — one of Madrid's most elegant and well-connected neighbourhoods.

finalCta.headline:
Join the club that changes
how fitness feels.
finalCta.body: Performance, recovery, nourishment, and community — all in one premium space designed around modern wellness.

footer.tagline: Where performance meets lifestyle. Boutique training, recovery, and nutrition in the heart of Madrid.
footer.rights: © {{year}} Pomona Club Madrid. All rights reserved.

membershipsPage.headline:
Choose the rhythm
that fits your life.
membershipsPage.body: Every membership is designed to integrate training, recovery, and nourishment into your daily routine. No hidden fees. No long-term lock-in. Just better movement, every day.
membershipsPage.trialBody: Book a complimentary trial session. Experience a class, explore the club, and meet our team — with no commitment required.

classesPage.headline:
Every session,
intentionally designed.
classesPage.body: From competitive HYROX prep to meditative Pilates — every class at Pomona is crafted for measurable progress, personal attention, and genuine enjoyment.

recoveryPage.headline:
Recovery is part
of performance.
recoveryPage.body: At Pomona, we believe what you do between sessions matters as much as the session itself. Our recovery suite combines science, warmth, and expert care.
recoveryPage.suiteDesc: Sauna, infrared, physiotherapy, and restorative movement — all under one roof.
recoveryPage.ctaBody: Club Plus and Signature members enjoy included recovery suite access. Physiotherapy and nutrition are available as add-ons or included at higher tiers.

healthyBarPage.headline:
Refuel without
leaving the club.
healthyBarPage.body: From cold-pressed juices to specialty coffee, protein bowls to functional elixirs — our bar is where post-workout recovery meets the social energy of a premium café.
healthyBarPage.ctaBody: The Pomona Bar welcomes everyone. Members enjoy exclusive pricing and perks. Drop in, stay longer, refuel beautifully.

aboutPage.headline:
A club designed around
how modern wellness
actually works.
aboutPage.whyBody1: Pomona Club was founded on a simple observation: the best version of fitness isn't just about the workout. It's about what happens around it — the recovery, the food, the people, and the space itself.
aboutPage.whyBody2: We created Pomona to be the place where ambitious, health-conscious people in Madrid can train with intention, recover with purpose, refuel beautifully, and belong to something worth coming back to every day.
aboutPage.differentBody: Most gyms focus on the workout. We designed Pomona around the entire day. Boutique class quality combined with open gym freedom. A recovery suite that rivals standalone wellness centres. A healthy bar that's a destination in itself. And a community of people who share your values.
aboutPage.spaceBody1: Every material, every light fixture, every corner of Pomona was designed to feel premium without being pretentious. Warm natural materials, considered acoustics, and an atmosphere that motivates during training and calms during recovery.
aboutPage.spaceBody2: Located on Calle de Serrano in the Salamanca district, Pomona sits at the crossroads of Madrid's most dynamic neighbourhood — between work, home, and the life you're building.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Smart training, not just hard training.
aboutPage.value2Desc: What you do after matters as much as what you do during.
aboutPage.value3Desc: Fuel your body with food that tastes as good as it performs.
aboutPage.value4Desc: Progress together, celebrate together, belong together.
aboutPage.ctaBody: Book a trial session and see the club for yourself. No commitment. Just better movement.

trainersPage.headline:
Expert-led.
Always personal.
trainersPage.body: Every coach at Pomona combines deep expertise with genuine care. Small groups. Personal attention. Real progress.

schedulePage.headline: Find your session.
schedulePage.body: Browse this week's schedule, find the class that fits, and book your spot. First time? Start with a free trial session.
schedulePage.trialBody: Book a complimentary trial session — no membership required.
schedulePage.openGymNote: Open gym is available during all operating hours.
schedulePage.upsellBody: Skip the per-session booking. With Club Plus, every class is yours — unlimited, priority booking, full recovery access included.

journalPage.headline:
Insights for
better movement.
journalPage.body: Training science, recovery protocols, nutrition wisdom, and Madrid lifestyle — curated by the Pomona team.

contactPage.headline:
We'd love to
welcome you.
contactPage.body: Whether you're planning your first visit or have a question about memberships, we're here to help.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.firstVisitTitle: What to expect on your first visit
firstVisitItems: Arrive 10 minutes early for a club tour
Enjoy a complimentary drink at the bar after
No commitment — just come and experience the club
